node.text: <font color='#5ABB9E'>24</font>条途径线路有实时公交信息
<font size="32">百佳超市(香港大学店)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> PARKnSHOP (The University of Hong Kong Branch)</font>
香港薄扶林香港大学庄月明文娱中心204室
<font size="32">安记水喉电器工程</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> On Kee Plumbing & Electrical Engineering</font>
<font size="32">万宁(般咸道)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Mannings (Bonham Road)</font>
中西区半山般咸道57号地铺
<font size="32">万宁(金马伦道店)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Mannings (Cameron Road Branch)</font>
尖沙咀金马伦道26-28号金垒商业中心地下
<font size="32">壳牌丰物路加油站</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Shell Fung Mat Road Filling Station</font>
丰物路与水街交汇处的东北方、西区副食品批发市场附近
